entries.dialogMessage: Phase-1 desktop language changes apply on restart. Shipping locales: English (en-US), Deutsch (de-DE), Francais (fr-FR), Japanese (ja-JP), Portugues (pt-BR), Chinese Simplified (zh-CN)
dialogFieldLabels: [Global Settings] ├─ ▶ General │ ├─ Desktop │ └─ Language ├─ Sourcebooks │ └─ Build Defaults ├─ Updates │ └─ Startup and Channel └─ Data Paths └─ Roster and External Tools
Change theme and scale Set desktop language Set sheet language and compact mode
Set desktop language Set sheet language Change theme Adjust UI scale
This pane should behave like the old utility settings form: navigation stays on the left, current-pane facts stay visible on the right, and dense work continues without wasting space.
Most values apply inside the current desktop session; language and some shell chrome changes still need a restart.

entries.dialogMessage: Search, filter, review source/cost/essence details, and confirm the selected implant.
dialogFieldLabels: [Cyberware] ├─ Augmentation Frames │ └─ Cyberlimbs └─ Core Systems ├─ > Bodyware └─ Headware

> Wired Reflexes 2 · Initiative boost · Essence 3.00 Reaction Enhancers 2 · Initiative support · Essence 0.60 Cybereyes Rating 4 · Sensor suite · Essence 0.40 Cyberarm Basic · Capacity shell · Essence 1.00
Cyberware > Core Systems > Bodyware > Wired Reflexes 2
Add & More keeps the selector open

Group | Core Systems Category | Bodyware Search Scope | current category only Data File | Core Rulebook Move the tree without losing grade or availability posture Review suites and accessories after picking the base implant
Filtered Catalog | 4 shown / 4 total Category Path | Cyberware > Core Systems > Bodyware Filter Posture | grade, availability, and source stay live
Review source, cost, and essence for Wired Reflexes 2 Use OK once or Add & More for repeated bodyware picks Keep grade Standard and rating posture visible while browsing

Grade modifiers, essence/cost deltas, and source details are surfaced here before the implant is added. Grade, book, and availability filters stay visible like the old selection form while Add & More remains available.
